tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating suboptimal long-term glycemic control and possible prediabetes or early diabetes. Chloride is slightly elevated, which may be due to mild dehydration or metabolic factors but is not alarming in isolation. All other parameters, including renal function and electrolytes, are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and monitoring of glucose metabolism.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
